title: EXTENSION IN DATE OF FILING OF INCOME TAX RETURNS FOR THE TAX YEAR 2024
text:
Government of Pakistan
Revenue Division
Federal Board of Revenue
Inland Revenue
No.6( I )S(IR-Operations) 12024 I 191 497 -R lslamabad. September the 301h, 2024
CIRCULAR NO. 02 OF 2024-25IR-OPERATIONS
(INCOME TAX)
Subject: EXTENSION IN DATE OF FILING OF INCOME TAX RETURNS
FOR THE TAX YEAR 2024
In exercise of powers conferred under Section 214A of the Income Tax
Ordinance 2001, the Federal Board of Revenue is pleased to communicate that the date of
filing of Income Tax retum for the Tax Year (TY) 2024, for the persons who are required
to file their retums by September 301h,2024 is hereby extended upto October 14th,2024 in
view of the requests from various trade bodies. Tax Bar Associations and general public.
,1
oforli4
3
Bilal Za
Secretary (Revenue Budget)
